key: "Introducing GPT-4.1" OpenAI context window 1 million tokens|5

value.title: Here's the big issue with GPT-4.1's 1M token context window: - Yes, it's a bigger haystack. - But GPT-4.1 only finds the needles half the time, if that. To OpenAI's credit, they write extensively… | Kyle Bahr
value.content: Here's the big issue with GPT-4.1's 1M token context window: - Yes, it's a bigger haystack. 🚀 Introducing 𝗚𝗣𝗧-𝟰.𝟭: OpenAI has unveiled GPT-4.1, the successor to GPT-4o, marking significant advancements in AI performance and efficiency... 🔍 𝗞𝗲𝘆 𝗘𝗻𝗵𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁𝘀 𝗢𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗚𝗣𝗧-𝟰𝗼:  • Expanded Context Window: GPT-4.1 can process up to 𝟭 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝘁𝗼𝗸𝗲𝗻𝘀, a substantial increase from GPT-4o's 128,000-token limit. • Superior Coding Proficiency: Achieving a 𝟱𝟰.𝟲% 𝘀𝗰𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗼𝗻 𝗦𝗪𝗘-𝗯𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗵 𝗩𝗲𝗿𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗲𝗱, GPT-4.1 outperforms GPT-4o by 21%, making it a powerful tool for software development tasks. • Improved Visual Understanding: 𝗚𝗣𝗧-𝟰.𝟭 𝗲𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗹𝘀 𝗶𝗻 𝗺𝘂𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗼𝗱𝗮𝗹 𝘁𝗮𝘀𝗸𝘀, showing better performance in interpreting images, charts, and videos compared to its predecessor.Analytics Vidhya  • Increased Efficiency: Offering up to 𝟮𝟲% 𝗰𝗼𝘀𝘁 𝗿𝗲𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝟰𝟬% 𝗳𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗼𝗻𝘀𝗲 𝘁𝗶𝗺𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗵𝗮𝗻 𝗚𝗣𝗧-𝟰𝗼, GPT-4.1 delivers enhanced performance at a lower operational cost. GPT-4.1 represents a 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗮𝗻𝘁 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗱 in AI development, offering enhanced capabilities for professionals across various industries. ## Sign in to view more content.

value.title: Key Upgrades in GPT-4.1. 1. Massive Context Window - Medium
value.content: GPT-4.1 introduces an unprecedented context window of up to 1 million tokens, a substantial increase from GPT-4o's 128,000-token limit.

value.title: Inside GPT-4.1: Technical Analysis Reveals Unexpected AI ... - Trickle
value.content: # Inside GPT-4.1: Technical Analysis Reveals Unexpected AI Breakthroughs. Hero Image for Inside GPT-4.1: Technical Analysis Reveals Unexpected AI Breakthroughs. GPT-4.1 handles an incredible 1 million tokens in one context window. This allows it to understand more than 750,000 words of text - about 3,000 pages. The OpenAI GPT-4.1 release shows remarkable improvements in many benchmarks. The model reached 54.6% accuracy on the SWE-bench Verified coding challenge, which is 26.6% better than GPT-4o. It also scored 38.3% on Scale AI's MultiChallenge benchmark for instruction-following - a 10.5 percentage point improvement from its predecessor. Maybe even more impressive is this AI's ability to maintain 100% accuracy throughout its full context length. GPT-4.1's lineup includes three distinct variants: GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 Mini, and GPT-4.1 Nano. The model achieved 54.6% on SWE-bench (Verified), which is a big deal as it means that it's 21.4 percentage points better than GPT-4o. This improved architecture powers all three variants—GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 Mini, and GPT-4.1 Nano—each tailored for specific performance needs.

value.title: OpenAI releases GPT-4.1 with 1 million token context window
value.content: Here's what's new: ⸻ What's New in GPT-4.1? ✓ 1 Million Token Context Window That's right – a massive jump from GPT-4o's 128K tokens! Perfect

value.title: Has anyone confirmed that GPT-4.1 has a 1 million token context ...
value.content: According to the description on OpenAI's website, GPT-4.1 and GPT-4.1-mini both have a context window length of 1 million tokens.
